_doc: Shape scale (theme schema v2, Layer 3). The canonical NAMED steps for a theme's shape character — corner radius + border weight. These are the reference values; the MECHANISM is that card-family block CSS reads `var(--r-card, <default>)` (corner) and `var(--bw, <default>)` (border weight), so a theme picks its step by setting --r-card / --bw and every card, framed panel, carousel + listicle follows. --density (Layer 1/2) stays the spacing MULTIPLIER on top. A theme that sets neither falls back to the block defaults (2px border, per-block radius) — backward-compatible. Honesty-tested by tests/test_shape_scale.py (the ladder steps are real + the tokens are consumed).

radius._desc: corner radius — a real theme axis from brutalist-sharp to pill

border-weight._desc: primary border weight — hairline gallery to heavy brutalist
